gaps.title: Add @gem_resonance trait for harmonic audio between co-located enchanted gems (A-009 example-driven request)
gaps.description: While composing examples/stress-tests/gem-vault-crystal-enchantable-2026-04-30.holo, the scene would be significantly more expressive with a @gem_resonance trait. When two @crystal_gem objects tagged @enchantable are held within 0.5 m of each other, they should produce harmonic audio built from their elemental base frequencies (e.g. fire=440 Hz, water=528 Hz, earth=396 Hz). The interference pattern creates a recognizable chord — a gameplay signal that crystal combination is meaningful. Suggested API: @gem_resonance { max_distance: 0.5, base_frequencies: auto, blend_mode: "harmonic", output: "spatial_audio" }. No Trait*.ts file implements this. The scene currently uses @crystal_gem + @enchantable without resonance, which parses fine but misses the sonic storytelling layer.
